body: Thank you for building this life with me, one gentle day at a time. Even the quiet moments with you feel extraordinary. You're my best friend before you were my partner, you've always been by my side, we've been through hell a lot but we stood by each other. Thank you for not losing hope in me. Thank you for putting a smile on my face every single day. Thank you for each and every memory we've created together weddings, engagements, proposals, birthdays, walks, dates, shopping, cinema and all other memories we've created. Thank you for always showing your love in every text, every date even when we sometimes disagree you always show your love. You're the dynamo, energy and the safety of this relationship. I'm so so proud of you and I will always be by you're side each and everyday until my last breath. I am so excited for our next steps that's why I've built this website for us to write our events, dreams store our photos and make it our memory. I want us to always remember and stay loving and caring to each other as we are today keeping this healthy relationship the best and alive.
